description:
Add --tasks-dir <PATH> to bl init. When given, balls stores tasks at the user-specified absolute path instead of the auto-generated ~/.local/share/balls/<hash>/tasks/. Implies --stealth since external paths are not git-tracked. Enables project integrations where multiple repos or tools need tasks at a predictable location.

Deliverables: CLI flag, Store::init plumbing, validation, tests, README update. Also audit config.rs tasks_dir field for dead code.
title: Custom tasks-dir for stealth mode
